login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to your Sitepins account
login.verifying_purchase: Verifying your purchase and setting up your workspace. This will only take a moment.

register.title: Create account
register.newsletter: I agree to receive product updates, announcements, and special offers.
register.terms_prefix: By creating an account, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms>
register.privacy_prefix: and your account information will be used according to Sitepins <privacy>Privacy Policy.</privacy>
register.success_toast: Registration is successful. Enter the OTP sent to your email to verify your account.

verify.title: Verify your account
verify.description: To continue, please enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email.
verify.email_missing: Email is missing, check the props values in verify.tsx

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.description: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send reset instructions.
forgot_password.success_desc: Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password. The link will expire in 15 minutes.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.description: Set a new password for your account.

link_expired.title: Link Expired
link_expired.description: Request a new password reset link and we'll send it to your inbox.
link_expired.message: This password reset link has expired or is no longer valid.
